chapters.title: New Office
chapters.content: Maya arrived at her new office early. She wore her best clothes and carried a notebook, ready to make a good first impression.

chapters.title: Meeting the Team
chapters.content: Her manager introduced her to the team. Everyone was friendly, and her desk was already prepared with a welcome note.

chapters.title: Learning Fast
chapters.content: The first day was full of new names, passwords, and meetings. Maya felt tired but excited for everything ahead.
